generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PhysicalChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis component responsible for steering and speed control via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller, adhering to ISO 15622 for ACC performance class I"
]

instance UpperLevelChassis : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Platform hosting autonomy hardware components including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for ACC control logic execution"
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoActuation : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "ROS2-based implementation executing actuation FE for converting desired speed into motor voltage commands via ROS2 control signals"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNanoActuation
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR generating point cloud data for object detection and environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera capturing 3D environmental perception data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated vehicle state sensors (speed, steering angle) providing real-time ego vehicle metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateMetrics
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateMetrics
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "Data Translation FE aligning ISO 23247 standards for standardized message alignment and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing FE converting raw sensor data into standardized formats for Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE implementing DBSCAN + Kalman filter for object track generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:outputTo ProcessedObjectTracks
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D point cloud representation of environmental surroundings derived from LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance EgoVehicleStateModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman-filtered state model of ego vehicle (speed, steering angle) for ACC control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNanoActuation
]

instance ObjectTrackModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman-filtered trajectories of detected objects for collision avoidance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-based speed computation model for adaptive cruise control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo JetsonOrinNanoActuation
]

instance HistoricalDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateMetrics
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time data for 3D visualization including ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateMetrics
]

instance ControlPanelData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Remote control interface data for ACC management commands"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateMetrics
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-component communication and lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTracking
    DTDFVocab:enables JetsonOrinNanoActuation
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationFE
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlPanelFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:HardwarePlatform [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer for real-time data processing and sensor fusion"
    DTDFVocab:enables JetsonOrinNanoActuation
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance ROS2Packages : DTDFVocab:SoftwareEnabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 packages implementing modular feature engines for system decomposition"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionFE
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:SoftwareEnabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 environment for rapid prototyping of feature engines"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:SoftwareEnabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex systems like point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:DataStorage [
    base:desc "SQL database for historical reporting of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]

instance ISO23247Standards : DTDFVocab:Standard [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 standards for digital twin architecture adaptation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing 3D visualization of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, detected object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationData
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceAnalytics
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from vehicle ECU to DT Entity using NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for high-performance processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlModel
    DTDFVocab:provides LatencyConstrainedProcessing
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote control of ACC via Control Panel User Interface including enabling/disabling, speed setting, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPanelData
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdates
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance PerformanceAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and object tracks for optimization (e.g., fuel economy improvements)"
]

instance ParameterUpdates : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC desired speed or emergency braking thresholds via Control Panel FE"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PredictiveMaintenance : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integration with state-of-the-art simulators for brake system health prognosis"
]

instance LatencyConstrainedProcessing : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enforced latency constraints ≤100ms end-to-end for real-time processing compliance"
]

// C1: Digital Twin Entities
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinEntity [
    base:desc "Centralized Digital Twin Entity hosting sensor-specific functionalities (Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE)"
]

instance DigitalTwinCore : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinEntity [
    base:desc "Core Digital Twin Entity containing ACC logic (Controlling FE) and data management (Data Collection, Reporting FEs)"
]

instance UserInterfaceEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwinEntity [
    base:desc "User interface entity split into 3D Visualization FE and Control Panel FE for modular interaction"
]

// C12: Feature Engines
instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "Aggregates raw sensor data (LiDAR, Depth Camera, vehicle sensors) for Digital Twin processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VehicleStateMetrics
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HistoricalDataStorage
]

instance ACCControllingFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "Contains ACC logic implementing ISO 15622 speed computation for autonomous driving control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EgoVehicleStateModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlModel
]

instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Feature Engine providing real-time 3D visualization of driving environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationData
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngine [
    base:desc "Control Panel Feature Engine enabling remote ACC management interface"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlPanelData
]

// C13: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalChassis
    base:contains UpperLevelChassis
    base:contains JetsonOrinNanoActuation
    base:contains HokuyoLiDAR
    base:contains IntelDepthCamera
    base:contains VehicleStateSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
    base:contains DigitalTwinCore
    base:contains UserInterfaceEntity
    base:contains DataCollectionFE
    base:contains ACCControllingFE
    base:contains VisualizationFE
    base:contains ControlPanelFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
  - **ACC Controlling FE** computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance (per ISO 15622) and sends actuation commands via ROS2 topics to the **Actuation FE** on the physical twin.
  - **Control Panel User Interface FE** enables remote commands (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) transmitted over Wi-Fi to the vehicle’s ROS2 nodes.
  - **Actuation FE** converts speed commands into motor voltage commands for the Vedder Electronic Speed Controller, ensuring real-time actuation with <100ms latency."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale operates at **real-time granularity** with:
  - **Data collection and processing rates**: Object tracks updated every perception cycle (~30Hz for LiDAR-based tracking).
  - **End-to-end latency**: Strictly constrained to **≤100ms** between vehicle and DT Entity (aligned with 3GPP V2V communication requirements).
  - **Clock synchronization**: Achieved via distributed systems standards (accuracy ≤100ms) to ensure event ordering and data integrity."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is structured as a **three-entity system** (ISO 23247-inspired):
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor-specific FEs (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE) and actuation logic (Actuation FE).
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages ACC control (Controlling FE), data collection (Data Collecting FE), and reporting (Reporting FE).
  - **User Entity**: Split into **3D Visualization FE** (for real-time monitoring) and **Control Panel FE** (for remote management).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: Implements **Data Translation FE** for inter-entity communication (Wi-Fi over ROS2 network)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation tool for ACC validation (simulated environment with 3D CAD integration).
  - **Manufacturing Phase**: Enables remote testing and troubleshooting via data collection and monitoring.
  - **Operational Phase**: Supports real-time optimization (e.g., fuel economy improvements) and predictive maintenance (e.g., brake system health monitoring).
  - **Representation Phase**: Operates as a **real-time operational twin** (not idealized or manufactured state), with fidelity validated via ISO 15622 compliance."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Data Accuracy**: LiDAR/Depth Camera fusion via ROS2 topics with real-time processing (≤100ms latency).
  - **Validation Mechanisms**:
    - **ISO 15622 Compliance**: ACC control logic validated for performance class I.
    - **Verification**: Kalman filter for object tracking, SQL databases for historical data integrity.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Data Translation FE addresses unit conversions and message alignment to mitigate integration errors.
  - **Error Mitigation**: Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE uses DBSCAN for noise reduction in raw LiDAR data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection employs:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **ROS2 Network**: Intra-entity communication (e.g., between FEs within the same entity).
    - **Wi-Fi**: Inter-entity communication (e.g., between Digital Twin Entity and User Entity).
  - **Communication Standards**: ISO 23247 Data Translation FE ensures standardized message alignment (e.g., unit conversions, message type alignment).
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100ms end-to-end latency (3GPP V2V specification compliance)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **cloud-based system** with:
  - **Hosting**: External device (not specified in documents; inferred as cloud infrastructure due to computation offloading).
  - **Deployment Architecture**:
    - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on-board the vehicle (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano).
    - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed on cloud infrastructure for ACC computation offloading.
    - **User Entity**: Hosted on a remote device (e.g., developer/operator terminal) via Wi-Fi connection.
  - **Middleware**: ROS2 for inter-entity communication, with data serialized via Data Translation FE."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with:
  - **External Information Systems**: Not explicitly detailed in documents, but implied to support:
    - **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) Communication**: Aligned with 3GPP V2V standards for low-latency data exchange.
    - **Digital Threads**: Enables end-to-end lifecycle management of vehicles (e.g., product lifecycle management tools)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are not explicitly addressed in the documents. However, inferred considerations include:
  - **Data Collection**: LiDAR/Depth Camera data owned by the vehicle owner (physical twin).
  - **Data Processing**: Digital Twin Entity processes data for remote management but does not claim ownership.
  - **Privacy**: No explicit mention of anonymization or encryption protocols for data transmission (Wi-Fi over ROS2)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for DTs (adapted for automotive with a Physical Twin Entity).
  - **ISO 15622**: ACC control requirements (performance class I).
  - **3GPP 22.185**: V2V communication latency requirements (≤100ms).
  - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for inter-entity communication.
  - **OPC UA/IEC 62541**: Potential future adoption for Data Translation FE (not implemented in this case study)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety-Critical Design**:
    - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100ms end-to-end latency to prevent catastrophic failures (e.g., delayed braking).
    - **Clock Synchronization**: ≤100ms accuracy for distributed systems to ensure event ordering.
  - **Security Measures**:
    - **Remote Management**: Enabled via Wi-Fi but not detailed for authentication/encryption (implied to be handled by underlying network protocols).
    - **Data Integrity**: Data Translation FE ensures standardized message alignment to prevent corruption.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: DT operates with a **Human-in-the-Loop** model (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin per Liberty to act vs. Ability to act taxonomy), ensuring operator oversight for critical commands (e.g., emergency braking)."
]
